name: Razorpay MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Razorpay MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Razorpay's payment platform — managing orders, payments, refunds, subscriptions, payment links, and accessing Razorpay's India-focused payment infrastructure including UPI, Net Banking, and wallets.
use_cases: Creating and managing payment orders from ecommerce agents
Querying payment status and refund processing from customer service agents
Managing recurring subscriptions from billing automation agents
Generating payment links from invoicing agents
Analyzing transaction data and reconciliation from finance agents
Managing virtual accounts for B2B payment collection agents
not_for: Teams operating outside India and South Asia (Razorpay primarily serves India)
Teams using Stripe, Square, or international payment processors
best_when: An agent needs to manage payments for an India-based business — especially for UPI, Net Banking, and domestic Indian payment methods.
avoid_when: You're operating outside India or using Stripe, Square, or another global payment processor.

auth.notes: Razorpay API key (Key ID + Key Secret pair). Test vs live mode keys are separate. No scope granularity — full account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test mode is free; live requires business verification
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard: 2% per transaction; specific methods vary
pricing.notes: Transaction-fee based pricing. No monthly fee. Test mode available for development. Business KYC required for live mode. MCP server is open source.

known_agent_gotchas: Test mode and live mode use different API keys — agents must use correct environment
API key lacks scope granularity — full account access
Business KYC verification required before accepting live payments
INR is the primary currency — international currencies require special setup
UPI payments require different flow than card payments
Webhook signature verification critical for payment confirmation security
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key lacks scopes. PCI-DSS. Business KYC for live payments. India data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key lacks scopes. PCI-DSS. India data residency.
